rupture.observation: Intervention intensity rose much faster than certification volume, suggesting a regulatory hardening rather than simple output expansion.

governance_mode.observation: The operational mode is overwhelmingly subtractive: deletion dominates intervention logic.

language_disparity.observation: Burden distribution is uneven across language clusters, with several languages showing far higher intervention time per certificate than English.

lexical_proceduralization.observation: Even after decline from 2018 peaks, command-style vocabulary remains structurally persistent in the archive language of censorship instructions.
